summary: Remove OAuth API sign-in and use web Gmail sessions only.

changed: Account Center now uses Add Gmail (Web Sign-In) only — the OAuth API sign-in button and built-in Client ID are removed
Legacy OAuth/API accounts are cleared on launch; Gmail, Chat, and Calendar run through isolated web sessions
README and website copy updated to describe web sign-in instead of OAuth setup
removed: Add Google Account (API) sign-in flow and embedded Google OAuth credentials
